title: Can deleted updates be recovered?

posts.author: shervinyvr (shervin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
I tried exploring the recycle bin tool to recover one of my colleagues deleted update on a shared board… seems like the update is gone for good… is there anywhere we can recover it?

Many thanks! I hope this answer was not solved on another topic, I tried looking for it beforehand!

posts.author: bradley (Bradley Vanderhorst)
posts.cookedHtml:
hey @shervinyvr - welcome to the monday.com community and extension of the monday.com family.

You are correct in your findings, at this time there is not a way to restore deleted updates. If you need to find what an update said you can search your email to see if you receive a notification for it before it was deleted.

Let us know if there is anything else we can help you with.
